raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding mathematical definitions and formulas, identifying a critical error in the interpretation of the Conforti-Cornuéjols bound.",
    "R1.6": "The output reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning, and clear explanations of complex technical concepts.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, providing a detailed uncertainty disclosure statement.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), addressing all relevant dimensions without drifting off-topic.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text, specifically the incorrect interpretation of the Conforti-Cornuéjols bound and its implications for the design principle.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including citations to relevant literature and explanations of mathematical concepts."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.95,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.85
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding mathematical definitions and formulas, identifying a critical error in the interpretation of the Conforti-Cornuéjols bound.
rationale.R1.6: The output reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning, and clear explanations of complex technical concepts.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, providing a detailed uncertainty disclosure statement.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), addressing all relevant dimensions without drifting off-topic.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text, specifically the incorrect interpretation of the Conforti-Cornuéjols bound and its implications for the design principle.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including citations to relevant literature and explanations of mathematical concepts.
